Sprint Control Tower

Action queue for the active sprint

One queue, one source of truth: Jira flow, notes, reminders, PR context and manual follow-up state.

GitHub PR signals OFF Sprint capacity unavailable
Queue 0
Blocked 0
Needs PR 0
Frozen 0
🎛️
Queue Filters Slice the queue by owner, reason, Jira status, PR status, tracking and your manual follow-up
Tags
0 visible
🚦
Prioritized Queue 0 shown
🔥
Engineer Hotspots Who is overloaded or accumulating blocked/frozen work
📊
Signal Mix Current distribution of the queue

📤 Jira History Exporter

Export issue field changes to CSV · You must be logged into Jira

ℹ️

How it works

Simple 3-step process to export your Jira history

1

Write a JQL querySpecify which issues to analyze (e.g., by project, sprint, date range).

2

Click ExportThe tool fetches all matching issues and their complete change history from Jira.

3

Download CSVOpen the file in Excel or Google Sheets for analysis and reporting.

🔍

Tracked Fields

Only changes to these fields will appear in the export

Story Points Description Acceptance Criteria Epic Link Sprint
⬇️

Export History

You must be logged into Jira in this browser for this to work

💡 Quick examples — click to use:
Active Sprint Last Closed Sprint Updated last 7 days Stories — last 30 days
Fetching issues... 0%
✅Export complete!
